# 工作记忆

工作记忆 is a core concept in cognitive science and psychology. Closely related to [[metacognition]], [[selective-attention]], [[spaced-repetition]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
